---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a broken or incorrect component
title: "[BUG] <component-name> — brief description"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Component Name

Which component has the bug? (e.g., Button, Dialog, Input)

## Platform

- [ ] Android
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Both

## React Native Version

```
# Run: npx react-native --version
```

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens?

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a recording to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (device, OS version, etc.)
